news.title: Stolen chairs won't ruin holiday spirit for Dunwoody parade regular
news.summary: A Dunwoody woman says her family had to purchase new lawn chairs after she says someone stole their original set from their viewing spot along Mount Vernon Road ahead of the annual Fourth of July para

news.title: 'Armed and dangerous' suspect accused of shooting pregnant woman during argument arrested, police say
news.summary: Riverdale Police said the suspect was located in Atlanta.

news.title: 2 women arrested for meth trafficking during Marietta traffic stop
news.summary: A Marietta traffic stop led to the seizure of about a half-pound of methamphetamine.
